_comment: Per-model x402 price for the agent payment rail, in micro-USD per call (1 USDC = 1_000_000). Replaces the old flat per-endpoint price so frontier models are not sold at nano price. Derived as: round(2x markup * (assumed_input_tokens*input_rate + assumed_output_tokens*output_rate) / 1e6 * 1e6), where rates are per-1M-token USD from upstream_costs.json and a typical call is ~1000 input + ~1000 output tokens. Models whose upstream cost is $0 (NVIDIA NIM / Ollama-subscription / unlisted) use the floor. CALIBRATE before launch: the markup and assumed-token shape are policy levers the owner should confirm.
